---
brand:
  typography:
    fonts:
      - family: JetBrains Mono
        source: google
    monospace:
      family: JetBrains Mono
---

Summarise a numeric vector in R:

```r
punctuality <- c(0.82, 0.78, 0.71, 0.88, 0.65, 0.90)
mean(punctuality)
```

You can also use `mean()` inline like this: `mean(punctuality)`.
